_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: Doxorubicin treated mice showed a significant reduction in BrdU incorporation, reflecting effective targeting of DNA replicating cells
details: Doxorubicin treatment (4 mg/kg every 3 days for 4 doses) showed significant reduction in BrdU incorporation, effectively targeting DNA replicating cells
